inline_comments.message: Checkstyle remark - METHOD_DEF should be separated from previous statement (EmptyLineSeperatorCheck)
Checkstyle remark- distance between variables 'vnfRepository' declaration and its first usage is 4, but allowed only 3.
Consider using Arrays.asList(new Version(...), new Version(...)) instead of four lines.

1. Consider using Arrays.aslList
2. There is no use in setting initial value for 1. This constructor is aimed to use with large lists.
Sonar - Generic exceptions should never be thrown
a) Mine doesn't show anything. Are you sure you're running with the rules from ONAP's Sonar server? b) I guess it was done to accommodate any implementation.
whay do you need thsi configuration it is part of the docker config?
it is for unit-testing the name and structure of configuration file
